name: Haste
description: The card can be tapped on the turn it is played.

name: Summon
description: Move a card to the battlefield without playing it.

name: Expend X
description: Reroll the indicated dice to trigger the ability.

name: Spawn
description: Turn a number of mana dice to the indicated faces.

name: Rally X
description: Add X points to your score.

name: Protect
description: Prevent a unit from being targeted by your opponent. A protector cannot be protected.

name: Vulnerable
description: The card cannot receive protection.

name: Destroy
description: Move a card to the graveyard.

name: Banish
description: Remove a card from the game.

name: Assault X
description: Destroy an enemy unit of X or less power.

name: Assassinate X
description: Assault X, bypassing protection.

name: Seize X
description: Move an enemy unit of X or less power to your battlefield.

name: Armor X
description: Increases a unit's resistance to assault and seize.

name: Overkill X
description: The amount an assault exceeds its target's power.

name: Disloyal
description: The card is played to your opponent's battlefield.

name: Chaos X
description: Triggers if there are at least X unique mana types.

name: Paired
description: Triggers if you play or control a second copy of this card.

name: Echo
description: You may you may move this card to the top of your deck after the end of the round, once per game.

name: Imbibe
description: Triggers whenever a liquor card is equipped.

name: Devour
description: Convert a unit into an equipment. The target's abilities are disabled, and any equipment is destroyed.

name: Plunder X
description: Rally X when the unit is devoured.

name: Devotion
description: Triggers if your starting deck contains no Yeoman cards.

name: Purify
description: Remove all statuses from a unit.

name: Lock
description: Status that disables all of a card's abilities.

name: Poison
description: A unit is destroyed if it receives two instances of this status.

name: Stalwart
description: Status that allows the unit to remain on the battlefield after the round ends.

name: Immune
description: Status that prevents the unit from receiving additional statuses.

name: Invisible
description: Status that prevents the unit from being targeted.
